title: File upload dropzone for React
description: FileUpload dropzone with drag-and-drop states, hidden input wiring, and onFiles callbacks for Next.js admin and settings screens.

og.title: File upload · Zentauri UI
og.description: Accessible file dropzone with drag-over feedback and click-to-browse via a labeled control.

twitter.title: File upload · Zentauri UI
twitter.description: Accessible file dropzone with drag-over feedback and click-to-browse via a labeled control.

intro: FileUpload wraps a visually hidden file input with a large hit target. Drag files over the surface to highlight the active state, or activate the native picker with keyboard and pointer.
useCases: CSV and media imports in admin tools.

faqs.question: How do I handle selected files?
faqs.answer: Use the onFiles callback to receive a File array. You can also listen to onChange for the underlying input event when integrating with form libraries.

faqs.question: Can I customize the inner content?
faqs.answer: Yes. Pass children to replace the default helper copy while keeping the same focusable label wiring to the hidden input.

sections.heading: Overview
sections.body: The component clears the native input value after each selection so selecting the same file twice still emits callbacks. Use accept and multiple to mirror platform constraints.
